metadata.amended_after_consolidation_note: Two later amendment acts exist (per the retsinformation ELI changed_by graph, checked 2026-07-12); both are ingested alongside this document so the claims below are verifiable against committed text. (1) LOV nr 1642 af 16/12/2025 (source_id dk-lov-1642-2025-aendringslov): its § 1, nr. 1 changes § 1, stk. 3, 7. pkt. rounding divisor »12« to »24«; nr. 2-11 change § 2, stk. 1, nr. 10, § 4 (payout rules) and § 11, stk. 2. It does NOT change the § 1, stk. 1-2 base amounts or the § 1 a income taper. (2) LOV nr 303 af 24/02/2026 (source_id dk-lov-303-2026-aendringslov) changes § 4 e, stk. 1 and 4 (»3 år« to »5 år«) and inserts new sections after § 4 e in kapitel 3; it does not touch § 1 or § 1 a. Encodings of § 1, stk. 1-2 and § 1 a from this consolidation therefore remain current statutory text as of 2026-07-12; encodings of the § 1, stk. 3 rounding step must apply the LOV nr 1642 amendment.
metadata.consolidates_note: Consolidation of lov om en børne- og ungeydelse, jf. lovbekendtgørelse nr. 724 af 25. maj 2022, with amendments from § 2 of lov nr. 1389 af 5. oktober 2022, § 44 of lov nr. 753 af 13. juni 2023, § 6 of lov nr. 174 af 27. februar 2024, § 4 of lov nr. 482 af 22. maj 2024, § 4 of lov nr. 632 af 11. juni 2024, and § 8 of lov nr. 665 af 11. juni 2024 (per the consolidation preamble).
metadata.eli_legal_value: definitive (PDF manifestation per ELI format metadata)
metadata.responsible_ministry: Skatteministeriet (per the LBK colophon; the retsinformation ELI metadata graph currently records Skatte- og Vækstministeriet as responsibility_of, reflecting the later ministry renaming)
metadata.source_note: Official retsinformation.dk PDF manifestation (ELI legal value: definitive), downloaded 2026-07-12 from the stable ELI format URL. Text-embedded PDF, no OCR needed; Danish text (æ/ø/å) extracts cleanly. Key provisions for encoding: § 1, stk. 1 sets the tax-free børneydelse at 16.992 kr. annually (2011-niveau) for children under 3, 13.452 kr. (2011-niveau) for ages 3-6, and 10.584 kr. (2011-niveau) for ages 7-14; § 1, stk. 2 sets the ungeydelse for ages 15-17 at 10.584 kr. annually (2011-niveau); § 1, stk. 3 indexes these amounts to the Danmarks Statistik consumer price index relative to the 2009 index (annual average two years prior), with the computed percentage reduced 1.9 points for 2012 and 3.9 points from 2013 onward, one-decimal precision, rounding to the nearest krone amount divisible by 12 (24 after LOV nr 1642 af 16/12/2025), plus a further 660 kr. total uplift in 2023; § 1 a, stk. 1 reduces the combined benefit by 2 pct. of the recipient's mellemskat income base (personskattelovens § 7, stk. 1 og 3) above a bundfradrag of 700.000 kr. (2010-niveau); § 1 a, stk. 3 regulates the bundfradrag per personskattelovens § 20; § 1 a, stk. 4-5 deduct grossed-up (divide by 0,6) aldersforsikring/aldersopsparing/supplerende engangssum contributions capped at the pensionsbeskatningslovens § 16, stk. 1 grundbeløb.
metadata.title: Bekendtgørelse af lov om en børne- og ungeydelse (LBK nr 603 af 12/05/2025)

metadata.source_note: Official retsinformation.dk PDF manifestation (ELI legal value: definitive), downloaded 2026-07-12 from the stable ELI format URL. Captured for amendment diligence on the børne- og ungeydelse encodings: within the børne- og ungeydelsesloven amendment block it changes § 4 e, stk. 1, 1. pkt. and stk. 4, 2. pkt. (»3 år« to »5 år«) and inserts new sections after § 4 e in kapitel 3. It does not touch § 1 or § 1 a. Commencement: § 11, stk. 1 (1. marts 2026), with the § 11, stk. 2 non-retroactivity carve-outs for conduct before commencement.
